subcodes.first_line: Your recent letter dated 29 Safar 1339 hath been received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه اخیر شما رسید که بتاریخ ۲۹ صفر ۳۹ بود
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
